name: Philip Yee
background: Philip Yee is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 30 years of experience in corporate finance, financial reporting, and strategic planning in the mining industry. Prior to Eldorado, he was Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer at Kirkland Lake Gold.

company_affiliations.name: Eldorado Gold Corporation
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
